productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland CA Lopro Moc Toe Oxford comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear -  a perfect buy for those men who never compromise on comfort and style. UpperLeather upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleMid-hi ankle for comfort and styleFabric inner lining with suede lining at the lower heel for ultimate breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised Fit Embossed branding on the lateral heel for styleMidsoleCushioned anti-fatigue footbed with a leather lining on the backfoot with perforations, and Smart Comfort Biorhythmic Chassis channels to offer comfort where it's most neededOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot and waffle pattern lugs on the heel for ultimate grip and tractionshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
